productDisplayName: United Colors of Benetton Women Solid Black Top
description: Composition Black V-neck t-shirt made of 100% cotton, with short sleeves and Big Ben logo in crystal embellishments on left chest Fit Comfort Wash care Delicate machine wash at 30 degrees using mild detergent Do not dry clean Do not tumble dry, wring, scrub or bleach Dry flat in shade Warm iron; Do not iron directly on print/embroidery If “sporty” is your middle name, then this black t-shirt from united colors of benetton is designed especially for you. With clean cuts and a neat finish, this top looks great with jeans, shorts or skirts and sandals or sports footwear. Model statistics Product is a size M on a model of height 5.8” and chest 33"
